flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Clark State College fell 37% between 2006 and 2009 (9.0% → 5.7%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Clark State College rose 200% between 2021 and 2024 (33.3% → 100.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Clark State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Clark State College fell 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($16.9k → $14.5k).
